//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: Array
 #![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
 #![allow(unused_parens)]
 #![allow(missing_docs)]
 #![allow(unused_imports)]
 #![allow(unused_variables)]
 #![allow(unused_unsafe)]
 use std::ptr;

pub struct fastdata;

impl fastdata {
    const KEYS: [&'static str; 2] = [
        "suffix", "prefix"
    ];

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &'static str) -> bool {
        if key.len() != 6 as usize {
            return false;
        }


        for entry in Self::KEYS.iter() {
            if *entry == key {
                return true;
            }
        }
        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 2;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 6;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 6;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
